case_title: KANGHUI JERIEL ONG VS. BRIAN PATRICK FINNERTY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF KANGHUI JERIEL ONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIAN PATRICK FINNERTY, NIALL JOSEPH HAYES AND ELIZABETH R. COLLINS ARE PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLAIM LYNN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ONG, KANGHUI JERIEL FINNERTY, BRIAN PATRICK HAYES, NIALL JOSEPH COLLINS, ELIZABETH R
DECLARATION OF ELIZABETH COLLINS RE: NEW ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT COLLINS, ELIZABETH R

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONG, KANGHUI JERIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINNERTY, BRIAN PATRICK HAYES, NIALL JOSEPH COLLINS, ELIZABETH R $9,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,500.00, DEFENDANT NIALL JOSEPH HAYES SHALL PAY $1,500.00; AND DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH R. COLLINS AND BRIAN PATRICK FINNERTY SHALL EACH PAY $4,000.00 TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY ONG, KANGHUI JERIEL AS TO DEFENDANT FINNERTY, BRIAN PATRICK HAYES, NIALL JOSEPH COLLINS, ELIZABETH R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
